an1.188-197:1.1: (188) "Bhikkhus, the foremost of my bhikkhu disciples in seniority is Aññākoṇḍañña."
an1.188-197:1.2: (189) " … among those with great wisdom is Sāriputta."
an1.188-197:2.2: (190) " … among those with psychic potency is Mahāmoggallāna."
an1.188-197:2.3: (191) " … among those who expound the ascetic practices is Mahākassapa."
an1.188-197:2.4: (192) " … among those with the divine eye is Anuruddha."
an1.188-197:2.5: (193) " … among those from eminent families is Bhaddiya Kāḷigodhāyaputta."
an1.188-197:2.6: (194) " … among those with a sweet voice is Lakuṇṭaka Bhaddiya."
an1.188-197:2.7: (195) " … among those with the lion's roar is Piṇḍola Bhāradvāja."
an1.188-197:2.8: (196) " … among those who speak on the Dhamma is Puṇṇa Mantāṇiputta."
an1.188-197:2.9: (197) " … among those who explain in detail the meaning of what has been stated in brief is Mahākaccāna."
